sprint: v75.44 Sprint 7.2 + auditoria: nova tabela audit_log no Postgres (id, ts, actor_id, actor_name, actor_role, action, target_type, target_id, before_data, after_data, ip, user_agent, notes). audit() helper em _auth_lib.py grava em TODAS as operações: auth.login_ok, auth.login_fail, auth.bootstrap_password, auth.change_password, auth.admin_reset_password, user.create, user.update. Endpoint GET /api/v3/audit/list com filtros (action, target_id, actor_id, since). Página /v2/auditoria com filtros + diff before/after. Tela Usuários mostra última audit por user.
